payload.text:
ℹ️ HabitNest helps you build good habits with gentle reminders.

• Tap ➕ New habit to create a habit
• Tap 📋 My habits to see your progress
• Tap 📊 Weekly recap to review your week
• Tap ⚙️ Settings to change your timezone or recap time

Everything is reachable by tapping — no commands needed!
